calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-14-2002 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-12-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Settlement conference assigned to Department 303, Judge: Douglas C. Munson; Clerk: David Swanson; Reporter: Mary Hinds #2011. Daniel Bornstein appeared on behalf of Plaintiff and Cristian Coranio appeared in pro per. Settlement conference held. Case settled on the record in chambers. Lease forfieted for 1800 Pacific Avenue. Writ of possession issued immediately. Defendant to vacate on or before 3/31/02. Plaintiff to return security deposit. Trial date of 3/18/02 is vacated.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-13-2002 Advanced From Mar-04-02 To Feb-21-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-25-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. Tentative ruling adopted -- GRANT defendant MICHAEL CHRISTIANSEN's motion to strike. (JJM/MD) Eric Throne, CSR 7855

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-25-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. Defendant MICHAEL CHRISTIANSEN's demurrer is sustained with 10 days leave to amend. (JJM/MD) Eric Throne, CSR 7855

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-21-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Daniel Bornstein, Esq. 409-7611 for Plaintiff PARKLYN BAY COMPANY opposing party
Tentative ruling adopted -- Defendant Michael Christiansen's Demurrer to Complaint OVERRULED with 5 days to answer. Order signed in open court. (JJM/CL) LEE BATARA, CSR 3759
